summary: Comprehensive frontend testing for Sentinel X page redesign with freemium strategy. All 15 features tested successfully. The page (/sentinel-x) now displays Basic version (Bluetooth) as 100% FREE (only 9.95€ shipping), while Fundadores (4G, 149€) and Premium (4G Titanium, 199€) are paid with free shipping. Key elements verified: green promo banner 'SENTINEL X BASIC 100% GRATIS', hero section with 0€/249€ pricing and '100% GRATIS' badge, 3 model cards with correct colors (green/cyan/amber) and badges (GRATIS/RECOMENDADO/ÉLITE), Basic card shows Bluetooth limitations with X marks, Fundadores shows 4G LTE features, Premium shows Titanio+Zafiro premium materials. Order form has all 5 products (Basic, Fundadores, Premium, J, S) with dynamic pricing and submit button text changes based on selection. Sticky CTA properly shows dual buttons: 'Pedir Basic GRATIS' and 'Ver versión 4G'. FAQ includes comparison question between Basic and Premium. Regression tests pass for home page and Sentinel S page.

minor.issue: 401 console error visible (may be expected for unauthenticated call or endpoint may not exist yet)

passed_tests: TEST 1: /sentinel-x loads with green promo banner 'SENTINEL X BASIC 100% GRATIS - SOLO PAGAS ENVÍO 9,95€' (data-testid: promo-banner-free)
TEST 2: Hero shows '0€' price with '249€' crossed out and '100% GRATIS' badge (data-testid: hero-sentinel-x)
TEST 3: 3 model cards exist: Basic (green, GRATIS), Fundadores (cyan, 149€), Premium (amber, 199€) (data-testid: model-basic, model-fundadores, model-premium)
TEST 4: Basic card shows 'VERSIÓN BLUETOOTH', 'Funciona conectado al móvil', has X marks for no 4G, no cloud recording, no invisible SOS
TEST 5: Fundadores card shows '4G LTE INDEPENDIENTE', price 149€, 'RECOMENDADO' badge
TEST 6: Premium card shows '4G LTE + TITANIO + ZAFIRO', price 199€, 'ÉLITE' badge
TEST 7: Basic vs Premium comparison section with Bluetooth diagram vs 4G diagram found
TEST 8: Links to /sentinel-j and /sentinel-s found in 'Para Niños y Jóvenes' section
TEST 9: Order form (data-testid: purchase-section) has 5 radio options including sentinel-x-basic (data-testid: select-sentinel-x-basic)
TEST 10: Order summary shows correct pricing: Basic=9.95€ (shipping), Fundadores=149€, Premium=199€, J/S=4.95€ (verified)
TEST 11: Submit button text changes based on selection: 'Pedir GRATIS' for basic vs 'Comprar por 149€' for paid
TEST 12: Sticky CTA shows 'SENTINEL X Basic – GRATIS' with 'Pedir Basic GRATIS' button and 'Ver versión 4G' link (data-testid: sticky-cta)
TEST 13: FAQ includes 'Cuál es la diferencia entre Basic y Fundadores/Premium' question
TEST 14: Regression - Home page (/) loads with Sentinel X promo showing freemium model
TEST 15: Regression - /sentinel-s loads correctly with hero, pricing, cerámica feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sentinel X page fully verified at /sentinel-x with freemium strategy. Key data-testid attributes: promo-banner-free, hero-sentinel-x, model-basic, model-fundadores, model-premium, models-section, purchase-section, select-sentinel-x-basic, select-sentinel-x-fundadores, select-sentinel-x-premium, select-sentinel-j, select-sentinel-s, preorder-form, submit-preorder, sticky-cta, sticky-cta-button, faq-item-0 through faq-item-5. Pricing: Basic=GRATIS (9.95€ shipping), Fundadores=149€ (free shipping), Premium=199€ (free shipping), J/S=4.95€ shipping. Session storage key: sentinel_free_units. Cookie consent may overlay - dismiss with 'Aceptar todas' button.
